# Verify split-rootfs installation completed correctly.
#
# This escript is called AFTER the installer has run and the device
# has booted from the installed disk. It verifies:
#   - HV type in CONFIG and runtime
#   - Extension image present and mounted via dm-verity
#   - extsloader state ready
#   - Extension services running
#   - PCR12 measurement (if TPM available)
#   - EFI variable persistence
#
# Env vars:
#   EXPECTED_HV  - expected hypervisor type (default: kvm)

{{$expected_hv := "kvm"}}
{{$env_hv := EdenGetEnv "EXPECTED_HV"}}
{{if $env_hv}}{{$expected_hv = $env_hv}}{{end}}

# ── HV type verification ──────────────────────────────────────

message 'Install verify: checking CONFIG eve-hv-type...'
eden eve ssh 'cat /config/eve-hv-type 2>/dev/null || echo missing'
stdout '{{$expected_hv}}'

message 'Install verify: checking runtime eve-hv-type...'
eden eve ssh 'cat /run/eve-hv-type 2>/dev/null || echo missing'
stdout '{{$expected_hv}}'

message 'Install verify: checking "uni" did not leak to runtime...'
eden eve ssh 'cat /run/eve-hv-type 2>/dev/null | grep -qx uni && echo uni-leaked || echo hv-ok'
stdout 'hv-ok'

message 'Install verify: checking kernel cmdline...'
eden eve ssh 'cat /proc/cmdline | tr " " "\n" | grep "^eve_hv_type=" | tail -1'
stdout 'eve_hv_type={{$expected_hv}}'

# ── Extension image verification ──────────────────────────────

message 'Install verify: checking ext-verity-roothash in Core...'
eden eve ssh 'test -f /hostfs/etc/ext-verity-roothash && echo present || echo missing'
stdout 'present'

message 'Install verify: checking Extension image on persist...'
eden eve ssh 'ls /persist/ext-imga.img 2>/dev/null && echo exists || echo missing'
stdout 'exists'

message 'Install verify: checking Extension mount point...'
eden eve ssh 'mountpoint -q /persist/exts && echo mounted || echo not-mounted'
stdout 'mounted'

message 'Install verify: checking dm-verity device...'
eden eve ssh 'ls /dev/mapper/exts-verity-* 2>/dev/null && echo verity-active || echo no-verity'
stdout 'verity-active'

# ── extsloader state ──────────────────────────────────────────

message 'Install verify: checking extsloader state...'
eden eve ssh 'cat /run/extsloader-state.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o "\"state\":\"[^\"]*\"" || echo state-missing'
stdout '"state":"ready"'

# ── Extension services ────────────────────────────────────────

message 'Install verify: checking Extension services started...'
eden eve ssh 'logread | grep -c "Service started successfully" 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
! stdout '^0$'

# ── EFI variable persistence ─────────────────────────────────

message 'Install verify: checking EFI variable...'
eden eve ssh 'ls /sys/firmware/efi/efivars/eve-hv-type-* 2>/dev/null && echo efi-var-exists || echo no-efi-var'
stdout 'efi-var-exists'

# ── Kubevirt-specific checks ─────────────────────────────────

{{if eq $expected_hv "k"}}
message 'Install verify: checking zedkube started (kubevirt)...'
eden eve ssh 'logread | grep -q "HV flavor is .k.: enabling zedkube" && echo zedkube-enabled || echo no-zedkube'
stdout 'zedkube-enabled'

message 'Install verify: checking kube Extension service...'
eden eve ssh 'logread | grep -q "\[kube\].*Service started successfully" && echo kube-started || echo no-kube'
stdout 'kube-started'

message 'Install verify: checking 2GB EFI partition (kubevirt)...'
eden eve ssh 'efi_dev=$(lsblk -n -o NAME,PARTLABEL | grep "EFI System" | awk "{print \"/dev/\" \$1}" | head -1); size=$(lsblk -b -n -o SIZE "$efi_dev" 2>/dev/null); echo "efi-size:$size"'
stdout 'efi-size:2147'
{{end}}

# ── Rootfs is universal ───────────────────────────────────────

message 'Install verify: checking rootfs is universal image...'
eden eve ssh 'cat /hostfs/etc/eve-hv-type 2>/dev/null || echo unknown'
stdout 'uni'

message 'Install verify: ALL CHECKS PASSED'
